notes: Thin adapter layer (4 decls, 63 lines) wrapping mathlib's Field.finSepDegree for the project's PullbackIsogeny type. The two theorem results (sepDegree_dvd_degree, sepDegree_le_degree) are unused within this file but exported as API. The richer separability API (isSeparable_iff_sepDegree_eq_degree, sepDegree_eq_card_emb) lives in EC/IsogenyKernel.lean, not here.
